vocab.meaning: sự cam kết không lay chuyển
vocab.example: Being part of the varsity rowing crew required an unwavering commitment to grueling 5 AM practice sessions.

vocab.meaning: môi trường có tính cạnh tranh cao (áp lực lớn)
vocab.example: Playing in the national finals introduced me to a high-stakes environment where every minor error carried weight.

vocab.meaning: đồng bộ hóa các nỗ lực
vocab.example: In a relay team, it is crucial to synchronize efforts to ensure a seamless transition of the baton.

vocab.meaning: sự nhạy bén về mặt chiến thuật
vocab.example: Our captain was admired for her tactical acumen, often making split-second decisions that turned the tide of the game.

vocab.word: resilience in the face of defeat
vocab.meaning: sự kiên cường khi đối mặt với thất bại
vocab.example: Competitive sports taught me resilience in the face of defeat, helping me bounce back stronger after a loss.

vocab.meaning: một nhân tố/tài sản không thể thiếu
vocab.example: With his exceptional goalkeeping skills, he quickly became an indispensable asset to our regional soccer team.

vocab.meaning: củng cố hàng tiền đạo/hàng tiền tuyến
vocab.example: I was recruited to bolster the front line because of my speed and ability to exploit gaps in the opponent's defense.
By joining a basketball club, I was able to reap the benefits of structured exercise and improved social skills.

vocab.meaning: vị thế đội cửa dưới (đội bị đánh giá thấp hơn)
vocab.example: We actually thrived on our underdog status, which took the pressure off and allowed us to play more creatively.

vocab.meaning: phong độ dưới mức trung bình/kém
vocab.example: If any player delivered a subpar performance, the entire team would rally around to offer support and technical advice.
